topic: Integration & impact analysis for the 3 gem-team adoption proposals from research/007 — P1 typed-agent-io-adapter (child 012), P2 scoped-preexec-and-handoff-gates (child 013), P3 planner-review-focus-and-drift-hint (child 014). For each proposal: (a) HOW to integrate it into the LIVE spec-kit (concrete steps, where the new contract/fields live), and (b) WHICH existing skills / commands / agents / docs it impacts — change-type (add/modify/none), severity, and backward-compat risk. Read-only analysis; orchestrator writes state. Output: an impact matrix + integration roadmap + smallest-viable-first-step.
scope_note: Separate research packet (folder-local iterations 001-005), focused on integration/impact of 007's proposals. Not a new external-framework study.

subject_proposals.P1: 012-typed-agent-io-adapter — typed dispatch header + normalized output envelope (status/confidence/failure_type) as an adapter over @code/@review/@context
subject_proposals.P2: 013-scoped-preexec-and-handoff-gates — debug-handoff schema + boundary contract-first + pre-mortem field
